units.source_text: 場外衍⽣⼯具估值模型根據「無套利」原則計算預計⽇後現⾦流的現值。多種常規衍⽣⼯具產品的模型計算法均為業界劃⼀採⽤。⾄於較複雜的衍
units.translation_target_text: The OTC derivatives valuation model calculates the present value of expected future cash flows based on the "no arbitrage" principle. The model calculation methods for a variety of conventional derivative products are uniformly adopted by the industry. As for the more complex derivatives

The model calculation methods for a variety of conventional derivative products are uniformly adopted by the industry. As for the more complex derivatives

units.source_text: ⽣⼯具產品，市場實際使⽤的⽅法可能略有差異。估值模型所⽤的數據會盡可能按可觀察市場數據釐定，該等數據包括來⾃交易所、交易商、經紀
units.translation_target_text: Tool products are produced, and the actual methods used in the market may be slightly different. The data used in the valuation model will be determined based on observable market data as much as possible, including data from exchanges, dealers, brokers
units.translation_en: Tool products are produced, and the actual methods used in the market may be slightly different. The data used in the valuation model will be determined based on observable market data as much as possible, including data from exchanges, dealers, brokers

layout_variants.display_en: Tool products are produced, and the actual methods used in the market may be slightly different. The data used in the valuation model will be determined based on observable market data as much as possible, including data from exchanges, dealers, brokers

units.source_text: 或⼀致訂價提供者的價格。若⼲數據未必可於市場直接觀察，但可透過模型校準程序按可觀察價格釐定，或按過往數據或其他資料來源估算。
units.translation_target_text: or prices from consistent pricing providers. Certain data may not be directly observable in the market, but can be determined based on observable prices through model calibration procedures, or estimated based on historical data or other information sources.
units.translation_en: or prices from consistent pricing providers. Certain data may not be directly observable in the market, but can be determined based on observable prices through model calibration procedures, or estimated based on historical data or other information sources.

units.source_text: 1 計入年內「⾦融投資：公允值增益／（虧損）」以及計入綜合全⾯收益表內的「匯兌差額」。
units.translation_target_text: 1 Included in “Financial investments: fair value gain/(loss)” during the year and “Exchange differences” included in the consolidated statement of comprehensive income.
units.translation_en: 1 Included in “Financial investments: fair value gain/(loss)” during the year and “Exchange differences” included in the consolidated statement of comprehensive income.

layout_variants.display_en: 1 Included in “Financial investments: fair value gain/(loss)” during the year and “Exchange differences” included in the consolidated statement of comprehensive income.

units.source_text: 2 購入主要源於期內保險業務的增⻑。
units.translation_target_text: 2 The purchase was mainly due to the growth of insurance business during the period.
units.translation_en: 2 The purchase was mainly due to the growth of insurance business during the period.

layout_variants.display_en: 2 The purchase was mainly due to the growth of insurance business during the period.

units.source_text: 3 當中包括23億美元的轉撥，反映等級計算法的應⽤有所改善，主要影響保險業務。
units.translation_target_text: 3 Includes transfers of US$2.3 billion reflecting improved application of the tiering methodology, primarily affecting insurance business.
units.translation_en: 3 Includes transfers of US$2.3 billion reflecting improved application of the tiering methodology, primarily affecting insurance business.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: 3 Includes transfers of US$2.3 billion reflecting improved application of the tiering methodology, primarily affecting insurance business.

units.source_text: 公允值等級制中各級之間的轉撥被視為於各季度的業績報告期末產⽣。轉撥主要取決於價格透明度及評估數據可觀察性的變化。
units.translation_target_text: Transfers between levels in the fair value hierarchy are considered to occur at the end of each quarter's reporting period. Transfers depend primarily on changes in price transparency and the observability of valuation data.
units.translation_en: Transfers between levels in the fair value hierarchy are considered to occur at the end of each quarter's reporting period. Transfers depend primarily on changes in price transparency and the observability of valuation data.
